_comment: Sources for public/data/feeds.json. Each entry has: kind (youtube-user | youtube-channel | youtube-playlist | rss), id/url, feed bucket. YouTube channel_ids (UC...) and playlist_ids (PL...) are verified against the org's canonical YouTube URL; see description. Prefer playlists when the channel has a dedicated waiting-children or Wednesday's-Child segment — the playlist filters out unrelated content.

sources.name: Grant Me Hope
sources.description: National nonprofit producing weekly bio videos of older foster youth; syndicated to TV affiliates in 30+ markets.

sources.name: AdoptUSKids
sources.description: Federally funded national photolisting (HHS / Children's Bureau).

sources.name: America's Kids Belong
sources.description: I Belong Project — state-organized waiting-child storytelling.

sources.name: Forever Family
sources.description: National TV-affiliate network producing the Forever Families segment.

sources.name: Bethany Christian Services
sources.description: One of the largest Christian adoption and foster-care agencies in the US.

sources.name: Bethany Christian Services (legacy)
sources.description: Legacy /user/ handle — carries older content the UC channel doesn't syndicate.

sources.name: Dave Thomas Foundation for Adoption
sources.description: Wendy's Wonderful Kids recruiter program; bio videos of specific foster youth.

sources.name: A Family For Every Child
sources.description: Oregon-based national waiting-child advocate and photolisting partner.

sources.name: Foster Love (Together We Rise)
sources.description: Former foster youth nonprofit; Sweet Cases, Build-a-Bikes, and alumni storytelling.

sources.name: Show Hope
sources.description: Steven Curtis Chapman's orphan-care and adoption-aid nonprofit.

sources.name: National Council For Adoption
sources.description: National adoption policy and education nonprofit.

sources.name: Barker Adoption Foundation
sources.description: DC/MD/VA adoption services and family-education content.

sources.name: KVC Health Systems
sources.description: Multistate foster and adoption nonprofit (KS, MO, NE, KY, WV).

sources.name: Administration for Children & Families (ACF/HHS)
sources.description: Federal umbrella for the Children's Bureau; adoption PSAs and policy content.

sources.name: Oklahoma Heart Gallery
sources.description: Regional Heart Gallery chapter — OK DHS + KTUL partnership.

sources.name: Louisiana Heart Gallery
sources.description: Regional Heart Gallery chapter, Louisiana.

sources.name: Heart Gallery of Broward
sources.description: Regional Heart Gallery chapter, South Florida.

sources.name: Heart Gallery Alabama
sources.description: Regional Heart Gallery chapter, Alabama.

sources.name: WFAA Dallas — Wednesday's Child
sources.description: ABC Dallas weekly Wednesday's Child segments (Heart Gallery of North Texas).

sources.name: KSL Utah — Wednesday's Child
sources.description: KSL TV Utah weekly Wednesday's Child segments.

sources.name: KVUE Austin — Forever Families
sources.description: ABC Austin weekly Forever Families segments (Heart Gallery of Central Texas).

sources.name: The Imprint Weekly Podcast
sources.description: Weekly news review from the independent child-welfare newsroom.

sources.name: The Imprint
sources.description: The only independent daily newsroom covering American child welfare.

sources.name: NCCPR (Nat'l Coalition for Child Protection Reform)
sources.description: Advocacy blog on foster-care reform.

sources.name: Casey Family Programs
sources.description: The nation's largest operating foundation focused on foster care.

sources.name: Annie E. Casey Foundation
sources.description: Kids Count data host and child-welfare research publisher.

sources.name: Chronicle of Social Change / Youth Services Insider
sources.description: The Imprint's policy-and-politics desk.

sources.name: ChildTrends
sources.description: Nonpartisan research on children and families.

sources.name: FosterClub
sources.description: National network of youth in foster care.
